title: Hotplate Magnetic Stirrer made with conductive ink
description:
Link for Ink:https://secure.workingink.co.uk/shop/working-ink-ink/working-ink-water-resistant-conductive-ink-emf-shielding-1l/
Demonstration of a homemade magnetic hot plate stirrer which costs very little to build. Let me know in the comments if there is interest in a full build guide for this machine. Have a great day everyone!
